name: DACH Regional Governance
rational: German-speaking countries (DE, AT, CH) share regulatory frameworks, language, and economic integration. This governance validates media, government, carrier and energy reachability within DACH as a coherent regional unit — relevant for national resilience monitoring and cross-border incident correlation.
controls: Media outlets reachable — public broadcaster priority
Government portals reachable for DE, AT, CH
Carrier web presence as proxy for ISP operational status
Energy operator reachability — critical infrastructure indicator
requirements: REQ-IOF-DACH-001: Public broadcaster reachability — DE AT CH
REQ-IOF-DACH-002: Government portal availability — DE AT CH
REQ-IOF-DACH-003: Carrier presence — DE primary, AT CH secondary
REQ-IOF-DACH-004: Energy operator reachability — DE primary

description.purpose: DACH regional resilience — media, government, carrier, energy
